name: BLACK RING-XFADE
subtitle: Dual Ring Modulator / Waveshaper / Crossfader / VCA
summary: A 10 HP amplitude modulation powerplant combining two unconventional ring modulators/waveshapers, a voltage-controlled crossfader, and a VCA in a single module. Unlike conventional ring modulators, it passes signal unaltered with no carrier present; low carrier levels produce unique waveshaping. AC/DC coupling is selectable on the crossfader; the VCA has a selectable bias.
